name: Celestial Gold Ring
description: Handcrafted 22K gold ring with celestial motif detailing.
longDescription: The Celestial Gold Ring embodies timeless elegance with meticulous hand-engraving inspired by starlit skies. Each piece is crafted by master artisans using ethically sourced gold, making it a perfect heirloom for generations.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning craftsmanship. Exceeded my expectations!

reviews.author: Ananya R.
reviews.comment: The detailing is exquisite. Perfect engagement ring.

name: Emerald Royale Necklace
description: Emerald centerpiece with diamond accents on a gold chain.
longDescription: A statement necklace featuring a certified emerald solitaire surrounded by brilliant-cut diamonds, set in premium 18K gold. Designed for grand occasions and red-carpet moments.

reviews.author: Meera K.
reviews.comment: Breathtaking piece. Received so many compliments at the wedding.

name: Pearl Elegance Earrings
description: South Sea pearls with gold filigree drop design.
longDescription: Delicate drop earrings featuring lustrous South Sea pearls suspended from intricate gold filigree. A versatile piece that transitions effortlessly from day to evening wear.

name: Diamond Line Bracelet
description: Tennis bracelet with VS clarity diamonds in white gold.
longDescription: A classic tennis bracelet featuring a continuous line of VS clarity diamonds set in rhodium-plated white gold. Secure box clasp with double safety latch for peace of mind.

name: Lotus Gold Pendant
description: Lotus motif pendant with micro-pave diamond center.
longDescription: Inspired by the sacred lotus, this pendant features hand-carved gold petals with a micro-pave diamond center. Comes with an adjustable gold chain.

name: Ruby Heritage Ring
description: Vintage-inspired ruby ring with antique gold finish.
longDescription: A heritage-inspired design featuring a Burmese ruby cabochon set in oxidized antique gold. Each ring tells a story of royal Indian craftsmanship.
